subcodes.first_line: O friends of God! Name the gathering the "Assembly of Fellowship", for the word "consultation" is not necessary, perchance [3.5s]... ...In the Spiritual Assembly, the discussions must be confined to beneficial matters, that is, the exaltation of the Word of God, the propagation of the divine Teachings, the education of souls
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران الهی مجلس را نام محفل انس بگذارید زیرا لفظ شور لزوم ندارد شاید
subcodes.subjects: @charitable associations; humanitarian activities, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @education of children; moral education, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
